description: SlowFast for action recognition — maps to Endsley SA Level 2 (comprehension)
cog_sci_theory: Endsley SA Level 2 — fast pathway captures rapid changes (detection), slow pathway captures semantics (comprehension)

description: PoseC3D skeleton-based — maps to Heider-Simmel intent attribution
cog_sci_theory: Heider-Simmel — intent attribution from body movement patterns, stripped of appearance cues

description: VideoMAE self-supervised — maps to Zacks event segmentation
cog_sci_theory: Zacks event segmentation — self-supervised learning discovers temporal boundaries without labels
